title: Ice Cream Maker: Food Cooking
description: Make ice cream! Features: - Tons of flavors to choose from, such as strawberry, watermelon, lemon, cherry, chocolate, cookie! - You can also pick the wrappers, the backgrounds, and the cones, so colorful! - We have over 30 ice creams to create! - You can find some hidden cups when you unlock new orders try to create your unique ice cream! - Be an ice cream master, feel relaxed and satisfied. How to play: - Use interactive controls to play it. - Hold the ice cream flavors until the ice cream is done! - Mix various ingredients to create the target ice cream. - Try to press the button with two hands, then you can find a surprise!
